notes.transfer_bytes: Cold-cache local transfer budget per representative page. Third-party analytics and fonts are blocked by the quality gate.
notes.article_transfer: The article archive is a pinned external Docusaurus build. Its duplicate 2.5 MB background is replaced during staging with the shared 309 KB asset; budgets retain a narrow ceiling above the measured governed build.
notes.lcp_ms: Local deterministic smoke-test ceiling, not a substitute for field Core Web Vitals.
